# llms.txt for brisbane-renovation-t2-101

This page is an independent T2 cloudlink node in a chain structure.

## Primary link
- Links to buffer T2: https://sitesau.github.io/brisbane-renovation-services/

## Context
- Node role: feeder (middle)
- Money target: brisbanerenovation.com.au (T1 links to money, this T2 does not)
- Tier: T2
- Structure: chain
